title: Bridge Essay: Sense of own body shapes neural processes of memory encoding and reinstatement.
concept: Body as constructed percept — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership plasticity.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.
**Phase context:** Body as constructed percept — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership plasticity.

**Sense of own body shapes neural processes of memory encoding and reinstatement.** — Cereb Cortex (2024). DOI: 10.1093/cercor/bhad443. PMID: 38012107. How is the fundamental sense of one's body, a basic aspect of selfhood, incorporated into memories for events? Disrupting bodily self-awareness during encoding impairs functioning of the left posterior hippocampus during retrieval, which implies weakened encoding. However, how changes in bodily self-awareness influence neural encoding is unknown.
